dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: GxP Computerized System Periodic Review Management
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Start by registering your first computerized system. Once registered, you can track validation status, schedule periodic reviews, and manage compliance documentation.
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Overview of computerized system periodic review status
dashboard.noReviewsDue: No reviews due in the next 90 days.

subtitle.system_administrator: Your technical tasks and system status

mySystems.title: My systems
mySystems.subtitle: Systems where you have an assigned role
mySystems.empty: No systems assigned to you yet. Contact your administrator to be assigned to a system.

myTasks.title: My tasks
myTasks.subtitle: Tasks assigned to you across all systems
myTasks.empty: No tasks assigned yet. Tasks will appear here when periodic reviews are initiated for your systems.

pendingApprovals.title: Pending my approval
pendingApprovals.subtitle: Reviews and documents awaiting your sign-off
pendingApprovals.empty: Nothing to approve right now. Approval requests will appear here when reviews reach your step in the approval chain.

findings.title: Findings requiring attention
findings.subtitle: Open critical and major findings across your systems
findings.empty: No open findings. Findings will appear here when issues are identified during periodic reviews.

nextAction.approaching: Plan and initiate review — within {{days}} days
nextAction.no_review: No periodic review history. Schedule first review.
nextAction.scenarioA_one: Plan and initiate review — within {{daysUntilPeriodEnd}} day
nextAction.scenarioA_other: Plan and initiate review — within {{daysUntilPeriodEnd}} days
nextAction.scenarioC_one: Complete and approve review — {{daysUntilDueDate}} day remaining
nextAction.scenarioC_other: Complete and approve review — {{daysUntilDueDate}} days remaining

phase.draft: Review created — submit plan for review
phase.plan_review_objections: Plan review — objections raised, corrections needed
phase.plan_review_ready: All reviews complete — ready to submit for approval
phase.approved_for_execution: Plan approved — ready to start execution
phase.in_progress: Execution in progress — {{days}} days until due
phase.execution_review_objections: Execution review — objections raised, corrections needed
phase.execution_review_ready: All reviews complete — ready for final approval
phase.in_preparation: Review in preparation — {{days}} days until due

timeline.scenarioA_one: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period for this Periodic Review will be reached in {{daysUntilPeriodEnd}} day. Once reached, you will have {{completionWindowDays}} days to complete and approve the review.
timeline.scenarioA_other: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period for this Periodic Review will be reached in {{daysUntilPeriodEnd}} days. Once reached, you will have {{completionWindowDays}} days to complete and approve the review.
timeline.scenarioBCD: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached on {{nextReviewDate}}. {{daysRemaining}} days remain to complete and approve the review (deadline: {{completionDueDate}}).
timeline.scenarioBCD_one: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached on {{nextReviewDate}}. {{daysRemaining}} day remains to complete and approve the review (deadline: {{completionDueDate}}).
timeline.scenarioBCD_today: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached today. {{daysRemaining}} days remain to complete and approve the review (deadline: {{completionDueDate}}).
timeline.scenarioBCD_zero: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached on {{nextReviewDate}}. This is the last day to complete and approve the review (deadline: {{completionDueDate}}).
timeline.scenarioBCD_zero_today: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached today. This is the last day to complete and approve the review (deadline: {{completionDueDate}}).
timeline.scenarioD: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached on {{nextReviewDate}}. The deadline to complete the review ({{completionDueDate}}) has been exceeded by {{daysOverdue}} days.
timeline.scenarioD_one: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached on {{nextReviewDate}}. The deadline to complete the review ({{completionDueDate}}) has been exceeded by {{daysOverdue}} day.
timeline.scenarioD_today: The {{periodLabel}} evaluation period was reached today. The deadline to complete the review ({{completionDueDate}}) has been exceeded by {{daysOverdue}} days.

reviews.empty: No review cases yet. Create a periodic review to begin.
reviews.emptyNoCreate: You are not currently assigned to any periodic review. Reviews will appear here when you are included in a review workflow.

create.title: Create Review Case
create.step1Desc: Select a system to begin a periodic review.
create.step2Desc: Review and confirm the details before creating.
create.sodError: System Owner and QA cannot be the same person. Update the system profile role assignments before creating a review.

createGuard.activeExists: An active review case already exists for this system (Status: {{status}}). A new review can only be created after the current one is approved.
createGuard.duplicateError: Could not create review case. An active review already exists for this system.

actions.rejectDesc: Provide a reason for rejecting this review. This is mandatory.
actions.reasonRequiredDesc: Provide a reason for this action. This is mandatory.
actions.reasonPlaceholder: Explain the reason for this action...
actions.approveDesc: Select a conclusion for this periodic review.
actions.tasksIncomplete: All review tasks must be completed before submitting for final review. {{completed}} of {{total}} tasks completed.

deleteModal.title: Delete Review Draft?
deleteModal.description: This will permanently remove this review case from the active list. This action cannot be undone. The record will be retained in the database for audit purposes.
deleteModal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this review case is being deleted...
deleteModal.reasonMinLength: Reason must be at least 10 characters.
deleteModal.deleteError: Could not delete this review case. It may have been updated by another user.

editModal.title: Edit Review Plan
editModal.reviewLevelHelper: Suggested: Level {{level}} based on system risk and GAMP category. Changing this will affect the number of tasks generated.
editModal.separationOfDuties: System Owner and QA Approver must be different users to ensure separation of duties.
editModal.reviewLevelChanged: Review level changed to Level {{level}}. Task count will be recalculated when the plan is approved for execution.

banners.planApproval: This review plan is awaiting QA approval. The plan must be approved before execution can begin.
banners.approvedForExecution: Plan approved. Ready to begin execution. Start execution to generate and assign review tasks.

detail.frozenSnapshotDesc: System profile data captured at review creation time.
detail.tasksPlaceholder: Tasks will be auto-generated when this review advances to In Preparation status.
detail.tasksBeforeApproval: Tasks will be auto-generated when this review plan is approved for execution.
detail.tasksApprovedWaiting: Plan approved. Tasks will be generated when execution starts.
detail.tasksFutureUpdate: Task generation will be available in a future update.
detail.tasksPreview: This {{level}} review will generate approximately {{count}} tasks across {{groups}} review areas.
detail.returnToDraft: Return to draft to make corrections.

signoffs.title: Review Sign-offs
signoffs.description: All reviewers must complete their review before this case can advance.
signoffs.commentsPlaceholder: Add any comments about your review...
signoffs.objectionCommentsPlaceholder: Describe your objections and what needs to be corrected...
signoffs.objectionCommentsRequired: You must provide details about your objections
signoffs.objectionsDescription: One or more reviewers have raised objections. The System Owner must address the comments and return this review to draft for corrections.
signoffs.blockedPending: All reviewer sign-offs must be completed first
signoffs.blockedObjections: Objections must be addressed before advancing

tasks.title: Review Tasks
tasks.noTasksYet: Tasks will be auto-generated when the review plan is approved for execution.
tasks.tasksFailed: Task generation failed. Contact your administrator.

blocked.title: This task cannot be started yet
blocked.message: All {{phaseName}} tasks must be completed first. Progress: {{completed}}/{{total}} completed.

actions.reopenReason: Provide a reason for reopening this task. This is mandatory.
actions.notAuthorized: Only the assigned user or Super User can perform this action
actions.reviewCaseNotInProgress: The review case must be in 'In Progress' state to work on tasks
actions.readOnlyMessage: This task is assigned to {{assignee}}. You can view the details but cannot modify this task.
actions.reassignReason: Provide a reason for reassigning this task. This is mandatory.
actions.reassignedNote: Task reassigned from {{from}} to {{to}} by {{actor}}. Reason: {{reason}}

workLog.title: Work Log
workLog.placeholder: Document your work on this task...
workLog.minLength: Work notes must be at least 10 characters
workLog.emptyState: No work notes yet. Start documenting your work.
workLog.startFirst: Start this task to begin documenting your work.

evidence.title: Evidence Files
evidence.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
evidence.emptyState: No evidence files uploaded yet. Upload your first file above.
evidence.startFirst: Start this task to begin uploading evidence.

validation.evidenceAndNoteRequired: This task requires at least one evidence file and one work note before it can be completed.
validation.noteRequired: This task requires at least one work note documenting the evaluation before it can be completed.
validation.approvalNoteRequired: This task requires at least one work note with your approval statement before it can be completed.
validation.instructionsIncomplete: All instruction steps must be checked off before completing this task.

reviewCases.title: Review Cases
reviewCases.subtitle: Periodic review workflow management
reviewCases.placeholder: Review Cases workflow — coming in Iteration 3

evidenceVault.title: Evidence Vault
evidenceVault.subtitle: Secure document repository with integrity verification

findingsActions.title: Findings & Actions
findingsActions.subtitle: Track findings, CAPAs, and corrective actions

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Immutable record of all system changes (21 CFR Part 11)

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Create and manage user accounts and role assignments.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or username...
users.noUsers: No users found. Create the first account.
users.noMatch: No users match the search criteria.
users.name: Name
users.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete the account of {{email}}. This action cannot be undone.
users.unblockDesc: This will unblock the account of {{email}} and reset failed login attempts.

userForm.createDesc: The user will need to change their password on first login.
userForm.editDesc: Modify user details. Leave password empty to keep it unchanged.
userForm.userCreatedDesc: {{email}} has been created with a temporary password.

roleDescriptions.super_user: Manages the platform, creates and revokes accounts
roleDescriptions.system_owner: Owner of the system under periodic review
roleDescriptions.system_administrator: Administrator of the system under review
roleDescriptions.it_manager: IT department manager for the system under review

resetPassword.title: Change Password
resetPassword.subtitle: You must change your temporary password before continuing.
resetPassword.updatedDesc: You can now access the application.

systemProfiles.title: System Profiles
systemProfiles.subtitle: Register and manage your validated computerized systems

empty.title: No systems registered
empty.description: Create your first System Profile to get started with periodic reviews.

deleteDialog.title: Delete System Profile
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the system profile and all associated data.

systemProfiles.identifierDuplicate: This identifier is already in use by another system ({{systemName}}). Each system must have a unique identifier.
systemProfiles.identifierDuplicateError: Could not save system profile. A system with this identifier already exists.

form.intendedUsePlaceholder: Describe the intended use of this system...
form.reviewLevelSuggested: Suggested based on risk level and GAMP category
form.reviewLevelSelect: Select risk level and GAMP category to calculate
form.initialValidationDateHelp: Date when the system was originally validated (IQ/OQ/PQ completed).
form.lastReviewPeriodEndHelp: Enter the end date of the last periodic review if this system was reviewed before ValiTrack. Leave empty for systems that have never been reviewed. This field updates automatically when a review is approved.
form.reviewPeriodHintSet: Auto-calculated based on GxP classification and risk level
form.reviewPeriodHintEmpty: Select GxP classification and risk level to calculate
form.roleAssignmentsDesc: Assign users responsible for this system's periodic review process.
form.roleAssignmentsSoD: The System Owner and QA Approver must be different users to ensure separation of duties.
form.completionWindowHelp: Days after review period ends to complete the review. Standard: 90 days.

signoffs.title: Profile Review Sign-offs
signoffs.description: All assigned reviewers must complete their review before this profile can be approved.
signoffs.commentsPlaceholder: Add any comments about your review...
signoffs.objectionCommentsPlaceholder: Describe your objections and what needs to be corrected...
signoffs.objectionCommentsRequired: You must provide details about your objections
signoffs.objectionsDescription: One or more reviewers have raised objections. The System Owner must address the comments and return this profile to draft for corrections.
signoffs.blockedPending: All reviewer sign-offs must be completed first
signoffs.blockedObjections: Objections must be addressed before approving
signoffs.missingReviewers: All required reviewers (SA, QA, Business Owner) must be assigned before submitting for review.

banners.inReviewReadonly: This profile is currently under review. Return it to Draft to make changes.
banners.approvedReadonly: This profile is approved. To make changes, use 'Revise profile' to return it to Draft.
banners.onlyApprovedAvailable: Only systems with approved profiles are available.

esignature.title: Electronic Signature Required
esignature.description: This action requires your electronic signature per 21 CFR Part 11. Please re-enter your password to confirm your identity.
esignature.reasonPlaceholder: Explain the basis for this decision...
esignature.reasonMinLength: Reason must be at least 10 characters.
esignature.conclusionRequired: A conclusion must be selected for final approval.
esignature.disclaimer: By signing, you confirm that you have reviewed the relevant documentation and accept responsibility for this decision.
